summary_en: Culture Convenience Club to acquire Jimoty via tender offer at ¥1,420/share (minimum 6.56M shares; post-acquisition stake 67.06%) over 31 business days (May 18–Jun 29, 2026). Warrants offered at ¥63,000 per unit. Purpose: delisting. Board recommends tendering. Jimoty and offeror have commercial relationship under July 2025 basic cooperation agreement.
title_en: Notice of Board Endorsement and Recommendation to Tender in Public Tender Offer by Culture Convenience Club for Jimoty Shares and Warrants
translation_en_brief: On 15 May 2026, Jimoty's board resolved to endorse a public tender offer by Culture Convenience Club Co., Ltd. and to recommend that shareholders and warrant holders tender. The offeror will acquire Jimoty shares at ¥1,420 per share and warrants at ¥63,000 per unit. The tender period runs 31 business days from 18 May to 29 June 2026. The minimum tender threshold is 6.56 million shares; upon acquisition, the offeror's stake will reach 67.06% of outstanding shares. The stated purpose is delisting (非公開化). Jimoty and the offeror have an ongoing commercial relationship under a basic cooperation agreement signed in July 2025 focused on regional issue-solving initiatives.
